title: Dog & Cat Finger Toothbrush Pack (2) – 360° Silicone Pet Toothbrush with Protective Case – Perfect for Puppies, Tartar Removal, Bad Breath & Daily Pet Teeth Cleaning

features: ✅ALL-ROUND 360° TEETH CLEANING - Soft silicone bristles gently clean teeth and gums from every angle, making this an ideal dog toothbrush for tartar removal, plaque control and general pet oral hygiene.
✅FOR DOGS, CATS & PUPPIES OF ALL SIZES - Designed for pets big or small, this pet toothbrush fits comfortably on your finger for precise cleaning—even on fussy dogs or delicate kittens.
✅ FIGHTS BAD BREATH EFFECTIVELY - Regular brushing helps reduce dog bad breath and improves overall dental hygiene. A must-have for fresh breath and confident tail wags!
✅ SAFE, FOOD GRADE SILICONE DESIGN - Made from BPA-free, non-toxic materials—perfect for daily use and gentle on sensitive gums. Trusted by pet parents who care about safety and comfort
✅WITH HYGIENIC TRAVEL STORAGE CASE - Includes portable storage cases to keep brushes clean, organized, and ready for use—whether you're at home or on the go.
✅ SIMPLE, REUSABLE & EASY TO CLEAN - Simply rinse in clean running water and mild soap, allow to dry and keep your dog finger brush in the handy, hygenic individual storage cases provided

✅ MOST DURABLE, ROBUST DOG TOOTHBRUSH (PACK OF 2) - Up to 35% LONGER, 30% THICKER and MORE DURABLE than other pet finger toothbrushes. Increased lifespan of the brush, less likely to split or wear out.

✅HELP AVOID COSTLY VET BILLS! - Having your pet's teeth cleaned by a vet can cost up to £500! Neglecting your pet's oral hygiene completely can result in vet bills running into the thousands! Consistent, effective brushing can help to avoid these eye-watering charges!
description: Product Description Premium 360° Silicone Pet Toothbrushes Advanced Enzymatic Pet Toothpaste Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 378 4.2 out of 5 stars 713 Price £8.99 £ 8 . 99 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 Benefit Easy to use and more readily accepted by pets than traditional toothbrushes. Helps remove plaque & tartar from hard to reach parts of the mouth quickly and easily, while being gentle on sensitive gums Advanced dual enzyme formula provides a deep, long-lasting clean. Powerful natural ingredients combat plaque & tartar buildups, help protect against gum disease and tooth decay and promote fresher breath. Design 2 x 360° Silicone Bristle Finger Toothbrush. Designed to reach all areas of the mouth. Premium Silicone moulding protects against bites. Anti-slip fit minimises accidental swallowing. Designed to be used with our Premium Pet Finger Toothbrushes Suitable for all breeds of Dogs & Cats ✓ ✓
